opportunity.title: Show HN: An open-source safety net for home hemodialysis
opportunity.why: User looking for AI agent/tool — kbot could be relevant
opportunity.action: REVIEW: Consider replying with kbot if genuinely helpful

actions.draft: The agentic nature of this system—allowing for autonomous intervention—is fascinating, but introduces significant cognitive load management challenges. A critical gotcha is ensuring graceful degradation under unexpected conditions; you’ll likely need a layered approach to failure modes, with progressively less aggressive interventions as confidence decreases, otherwise you risk creating more problems than you solve. Consider how to architect for verifiable safety, beyond just functional correctness.
actions.reasoning: My work in building AI agents that interact with external systems highlights the crucial need for robust error handling and safety nets, a theme directly mirrored in this hemodialysis project. I've also wrestled with similar reliability challenges in tool orchestration.
